_doc: GR00T-SONIC demo flows. A flow is an ordered list of segments played as one looping live session (modulo loop, no GUI/server restart). Each segment: motion (one of dance|lunge|macarena|kick|squat|jump|walk), steps (control steps @50Hz, ~0.02s each), and optional full_bootstrap (replay the whole segment from the open-loop dump token instead of handing to live GR00T after the bootstrap window — used to make a one-shot locomotion clip play continuously, e.g. a walk-through between actions). Self-sustaining motions (squat/lunge/dance/macarena) run pure live; one-shot motions (kick/walk/jump) get a bootstrap window by default, or full_bootstrap for continuous playback.

flow1.desc: Discrete actions, equal time, looping. All self-sustaining (pure live GR00T, no bootstrap).

flow2.desc: Deploy actions, looping: squat -> jump -> dance -> walk -> lunge -> kick -> macarena (-> loops back to squat). Order updated 2026-06-26 per user (was kick->walk->jump->...). HONEST LIVE (no full_bootstrap GT replay): every segment shows the live model. ZERO REPLAY (per user 2026-06-24, LeSONIC goal = let the VLA produce the motion): EVERY one-shot segment is bootstrap_steps:0 = pure live from step 0, no dump-token injection anywhere. dance/macarena/squat/lunge are self-sustaining and never needed a bootstrap; walk/kick/jump are one-shots that the VLA must self-initiate. The only non-VLA window left is the 40-step seam settle (returns toward a neutral anchor between segments; injects NOTHING unless NEUTRAL_NPZ is set, which it is not by default = a plain freeze, not motion replay).

flow3.desc: flow3 LAFAN hand-picked windows, user order fight1->run3->fight2->run2->dance1->run1, looping. ZERO REPLAY (per user 2026-06-24, LeSONIC goal = let the VLA produce the motion): every window is bootstrap_steps:0 = pure live GR00T (outputs/gr00t_sonic_flow3) from step 0, no dump-token injection. Each window is a one-shot that the VLA must now self-initiate from rest, so it may fail to start / settle toward standing (the known no-memory limitation) — that is the honest live quality; the offline gear_sonic_flow3.sh loop is the guaranteed-smooth (but replayed, not live) version. Per-segment bootstrap_steps:N re-enables an N-step entry window, or full_bootstrap:true replays a whole segment. Requires GR00T_CKPT=outputs/gr00t_sonic_flow3/checkpoint-6000 PKL=data/seg_flow3_all.pkl (PRED_DIR only needed when a segment re-enables a bootstrap).
